events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, **critical** risk. Misreading APWA locate-mark colors (confusing electric/gas/water/sewer/comm) is a life-safety failure, not a cosmetic ID issue — it can lead to striking an energized electric line or gas main. Called for stop-work, 811/utility-owner reconciliation, re-marking by a qualified locator, crew retraining on the color code, and potholing before excavation resumes.
